scenes.purpose: Introduce Ella and establish the problem of a system anomaly.
scenes.objective: Ella wants to debug the system anomaly causing feedback loops.
scenes.turning_point: Ella discovers a ghostly figure within the data streams, hinting at a supernatural element.
beats: Ella debugs code, struggling with a system anomaly.
An alert flashes, revealing complex interconnected loops.
A ghostly figure appears within the digital chaos.

scenes.purpose: Introduce Marcus and his skeptical attitude towards Ella's work.
scenes.objective: Ella wants to resolve the issue despite Marcus's doubts and interference.
scenes.turning_point: The ghostly figure becomes more visible, but only Ella sees it.
beats: Ella continues debugging, ignoring Marcus's taunts.
The ghost appears behind Ella, visible to her alone.

scenes.purpose: Ella and Marcus collaborate to solve the anomaly.
scenes.objective: Ella wants Marcus's help to fix the loop, leading to a potential partnership.
scenes.turning_point: Ella convinces Marcus to work together, forming an alliance despite their differences.
beats: Ella realizes she needs Marcus's expertise.
Marcus reluctantly agrees to assist Ella.
They begin collaborating on fixing the anomaly.

scenes.purpose: Show Ella and Marcus successfully resolving the anomaly.
scenes.objective: Ella and Marcus want to stabilize the system and eliminate the feedback loop.
scenes.turning_point: The system stabilizes, demonstrating the success of their collaboration.
beats: Ella and Marcus work together, combining their skills.
They finally resolve the feedback loop anomaly.
The data center returns to normal, signifying a successful outcome.
